act-removeChecklist: uhlu lokuhlola olususiwe __checklist__ ekhadini __card__ ohlwini __list__ ku-swimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-removeChecklistItem: kukhishwe into yohlu lokuhlola __checklistItem__ ohlwini lokuhlola __checkList__ ekhadini __card__ ohlwini __list__ ku-swimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-checkedItem: kuhlolwe u-__checklistItem__ wohlu lokuhlola __checklist__ ekhadini __card__ ohlwini __list__ ku-swimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__

act-uncompleteChecklist: uhlu lokuhlola olungaqediwe __checklist__ ekhadini __card__ ohlwini __list__ ku-swimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-addComment: ubeke amazwana ekhadini __card__: __comment__ ohlwini __list__ ku-swimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__

allboards.delete-workspace-confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa le ndawo yokusebenza?
multi-selection-active: Chofoza amabhokisi okuhlola ukuze ukhethe amabhodi
activity-dueDate: ihlelwe idethi yamanqamu yaba ngu-%s ka-%s
activity-endDate: idethi yokugcina ehleliwe yaba ngu-%s ka-%s
list-width-error-message: List width must be an integer greater than 270
list-width-shared-note: This width is shared with everyone on this board.
list-width-personal-note: This width is only for you.
personal-list-width-description: When on, each user keeps their own list widths. When off, list widths are shared with everyone on the board.
click-to-enable-fixed-list-width: Same width for all lists disabled. Click to enable.
click-to-disable-fixed-list-width: Same width for all lists enabled. Click to disable.
fixed-list-width-note: When on, all lists have the same width, and resizing one list resizes all lists. This setting is only for you.
keyboard-shortcuts-enabled: Izinqamuleli zekhibhodi zinikwe amandla. Chofoza ukuze ukhubaze.
keyboard-shortcuts-disabled: Izinqamuleli zekhibhodi zivaliwe. Chofoza ukuze unike amandla.
swimlane-height-error-message: Ubude be-Swimlane kufanele kube inombolo ephozithivu
admin-desc: Angakwazi ukubuka futhi ahlele amakhadi, asuse amalungu, futhi ashintshe izilungiselelo zebhodi. Angakwazi ukubuka imisebenzi.
app-is-offline: Iyalayisha, sicela ulinde. Ukuvuselela ikhasi kuzodala ukulahleka kwedatha. Uma ukulayisha kungasebenzi, sicela uhlole ukuthi iseva ayimile yini.
archive-board-confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukufaka kungobo yomlando leli bhodi?
card_members: Wonke amalungu ekhadi lamanje kuleli bhodi
board_assignees: Bonke abanikezwayo bawo wonke amakhadi kuleli bhodi
card_assignees: Bonke abanikezwa ikhadi lamanje kuleli bhodi
board-drag-drop-reorder-or-click-open: Hudula bese udedela ukuze uhlele kabusha izithonjana zebhodi. Chofoza isithonjana sebhodi ukuze uvule ibhodi.
board-open-and-move-between-remaining-an: Chofoza ukuze uvule ibhodi. Sebenzisa isibambo sokuhudula ukuze unikeze ibhodi ku-__workspaces__ (yehlisa indawo yokusebenza kubha eseceleni).
card-delete-notice: Ukususa kungunaphakade. Uzolahlekelwa yizo zonke izenzo ezihlobene naleli khadi.
card-delete-pop: Zonke izenzo zizosuswa kokuphakelayo komsebenzi futhi ngeke ukwazi ukuphinda uvule ikhadi. Akukho ukuhlehlisa.
card-delete-suggest-archive: Ungahambisa ikhadi Kungobo yomlando ukuze ulisuse ebhodini futhi ulondoloze umsebenzi.
card-archive-pop: Ikhadi ngeke libonakale kulolu hlu ngemva kokufaka kungobo yomlando ikhadi.
card-archive-suggest-cancel: Ungakwazi ukubuyisela ikhadi kusukela kungobo yomlando.
list-archive-pop: Uhlu ngeke lubonakale ebhodini ngemva kokufakwa kungobo yomlando.
list-archive-suggest: Ungakwazi ukubuyisela emuva uhlu kusukela kungobo yomlando kuzilungiselelo zebhodi.
swimlane-archive-pop: I-Swimlane ngeke ibonakale ebhodini ngemva kokufakwa kungobo yomlando.
swimlane-archive-suggest: Kamuva ungakwazi ukubuyisela i-swimlane kusukela kungobo yomlando kokuthi Izilungiselelo Zebhodi.
card-members-title: Engeza noma khipha amalungu ebhodi ekhadini.
vote-delete-pop: Ukususa kungunaphakade. Uzolahlekelwa yizo zonke izenzo ezihlobene naleli voti.
editPokerEndDatePopup-title: Shintsha idethi yokuphela kwevoti le-Planing Poker
poker-delete-pop: Ukususa kungunaphakade. Uzolahlekelwa yizo zonke izenzo ezihlobene nale poker yokuhlela.
delete-avatar-confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lesi sithombe?
click-to-star: Chofoza ukuze ufake inkanyezi leli bhodi.
click-to-unstar: Chofoza ukuze ususe inkanyezi kuleli bhodi.
click-to-enable-auto-width: Ububanzi bohlu oluzenzakalelayo bukhutshaziwe. Chofoza ukuze unike amandla.
click-to-disable-auto-width: Ububanzi bohlu oluzenzakalelayo buvunyelwe. Chofoza ukuze ukhubaze.
card-aging-tier1: Tier 1 (light fade) after this many idle days
card-aging-tier2: Tier 2 (medium fade) after this many idle days
card-aging-tier3: Tier 3 (heavy fade) after this many idle days
close-board-pop: Uzokwazi ukubuyisela ibhodi ngokuchofoza inkinobho ethi “Faka kungobo yomlando” kunhlokweni yasekhaya.
comment-assigned-only-desc: Amakhadi abelwe kuphela abonakalayo. Angabeka amazwana kuphela.
read-assigned-only-desc: Amakhadi abelwe kuphela abonakalayo. Ayikwazi ukuhlela.
worker-desc: Ingakwazi ukuhambisa amakhadi kuphela, izinikeze ekhadini namazwana.
confirm-subtask-delete-popup: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa umsebenzi ongaphansi?
confirm-checklist-delete-popup: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa uhlu lokuhlola?
confirm-checklist-item-delete-popup: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa into yohlu lokuhlola?
copyManyCardsPopup-instructions: Izihloko Nezincazelo Zamakhadi Le fomethi ye-JSON

custom-field-delete-pop: Akukho ukuhlehlisa. Lokhu kuzosusa le nkambu yangokwezifiso kuwo wonke amakhadi futhi kucekele phansi umlando wayo.
custom-field-dropdown-options-placeholde: Cindezela u-enter ukuze wengeze ezinye izinketho

error-board-notAdmin: Kudingeka ube admin waleli bhodi ukuze wenze lokho
error-board-notAMember: Udinga ukuba yilungu laleli bhodi ukuze wenze lokho
error-notAllowed: Your board role is not allowed to do that
error-json-schema: Idatha yakho ye-JSON ayifaki ulwazi olufanele ngefomethi elungile
error-csv-schema: I-CSV(Amanani Ahlukaniswe Ngokhefana)/TSV (Amanani Ahlukaniswe Ngethebhu) ayifaki ulwazi olufanele ngefomethi efanele.
error-import-empty-board: This export contains no board content (no swimlanes, lists or cards). It may have been created by an older WeKan version with a known export bug. Please re-export the board with the current version and import the new file.
export-card-field-dates: Amadethi (Okudaliwe, Okwamukelwe, Okuqala, Okufanele, Okuphela Ngayo)
export-card-excel-no-disk-space: Ayikwazi ukuthekelisa ku-Excel: asikho isikhala esanele sediski samahhala
filter-on-desc: Uhlunga amakhadi kuleli bhodi. Chofoza lapha ukuze uhlele isihlungi.
advanced-filter-description: Isihlungi Esithuthukisiwe sivumela ukubhala iyunithi yezinhlamvu equkethe ama-opharetha alandelayo: == != <= >= && || ( ) Isikhala sisetshenziswa njengesihlukanisi phakathi kwama-Opharetha. Ungakwazi ukuhlunga zonke izinkambu ngokwezifiso ngokuthayipha amagama azo kanye namanani. Isibonelo: Inkundla1 == Inani1. Qaphela: Uma izinkambu noma amanani equkethe izikhala, udinga ukuwahlanganisa zibe izingcaphuno ezizodwa. Isibonelo: 'Inkambu 1' == 'Inani 1'. Ukuze izinhlamvu zokulawula okukodwa (' \/) zeqiwe, ungasebenzisa \. Isibonelo: I-Field1 == I\'m. Futhi ungakwazi ukuhlanganisa izimo eziningi. Isibonelo: F1 == V1 || F1 == V2. Ngokuvamile bonke opharetha bahunyushwa kusukela kwesokunxele kuya kwesokudla. Ungashintsha i-oda ngokubeka amabakaki. Isibonelo: F1 == V1 && ( F2 == V2 || F2 == V3 ). Futhi ungasesha izinkambu zombhalo usebenzisa i-regex: F1 == /Tes.*/i
import-board-instruction-kanboard: Paste a Kanboard export JSON: an object with "columns" (or tasks carrying column_name) and a "tasks" array (title, description, column_name, swimlane_name, date_due, owner, tags). Columns become lists and tasks become cards.
import-board-instruction-deck: Paste a NextCloud Deck board JSON (a board with "stacks", each stack carrying its "cards"). Stacks become lists and cards become cards.
import-board-instruction-openproject: Paste an OpenProject work-packages collection JSON (GET /api/v3/work_packages). Statuses become lists and work packages become cards.
import-board-instruction-issues: Paste a __sourceName__ issues JSON array (__endpoint__). Issues become cards grouped into Open / Closed lists.
import-board-instruction-asana: Paste an Asana tasks export JSON ({ "data": [...] } from the Asana export or GET /tasks). Tasks are grouped into sections (memberships); completed tasks go to Done.
import-board-instruction-zenkit: Paste a ZenKit list export JSON ({ "title", "stages":[...], "items":[...] }). Stages become lists and items become cards.
import-board-instruction-trello: Ebhodini lakho le-Trello, hamba ku-'Menu', bese uthi 'Okwengeziwe', 'Printa futhi Khipha', 'Khipha i-JSON', bese ukopisha umbhalo owumphumela.
import-board-instruction-csv: Namathisela Amanani Ahlukaniswe Ngokhefana(CSV)/ Ithebhu Amanani Ahlukaniswe (TSV) .
import-board-instruction-jira: Paste the JSON from the Jira Cloud REST API issue search (GET /rest/api/2/search), or an equivalent { "issues": [...] } object. Jira statuses become lists and issues become cards. Optionally include an "automationRules" array to import rules.
import-board-instruction-excel: Choose a WeKan-style .xlsx spreadsheet (the same columns as the Excel export: Title, Description, Status/List, Members, Labels, dates, custom fields). The first row is the header.
import-board-instruction-wekan: Ebhodini lakho, hamba 'kumenyu', bese 'Khipha ibhodi', bese ukopisha umbhalo efayeleni elilandiwe.
import-board-instruction-about-errors: Uma uthola amaphutha lapho ungenisa ibhodi, ngezinye izikhathi ukungenisa kusasebenza, futhi ibhodi isekhasini Wonke Amabhodi.
import-json-placeholder: Namathisela idatha yakho evumelekile ye-JSON lapha
import-csv-placeholder: Namathisela idatha yakho evumelekile ye-CSV/TSV lapha
import-json-file: Or select a Trello JSON file
import-attachments-zip: Trello attachments ZIP (optional, from Trello Card Attachments Downloader)
import-trello-json-file-hint: One Trello board exported as .json. If you have saved Trello API key and token, its attachments, board background and member avatars are downloaded too.
import-trello-zip-file-hint: A .zip with one or more board .json files and their attachments in board-name subfolders (from the Trello Card Attachments Downloader). All boards are imported.
import-trello-zip-no-boards: No Trello board .json files were found in the .zip.
import-trello-zip-too-large: The .zip is too large to import.
import-trello-zip-too-many-files: The .zip has too many files to import.
import-trello-zip-file-too-large: A file inside the .zip is too large to import.
import-trello-zip-unsafe-path: The .zip contains unsafe file paths and was rejected.
import-trello-workspace-placeholder: Imported board is placed under this workspace, created if it does not exist
trello-api-import: Import directly from Trello with API key and token
trello-api-import-desc: Paste your Trello API key and token to list your Trello workspaces and boards, then import the selected ones with their attachments.
trello-api-token: Trello API token (manually generated below the API key)
trello-api-credentials-required: Please enter both the Trello API key and token.
trello-api-credentials-saved: Trello API key and token are saved. You can list workspaces without re-entering them.
trello-select-boards: Please select at least one board to import.
trello-cancel-delete-confirm: Cancel the import and delete the boards already imported by this job? This cannot be undone.
import-members-map: Ibhodi lakho elingenisiwe linamalungu athile. Sicela ubeke imephu amalungu ofuna ukuwangenisa kubasebenzisi bakho
import-members-map-note: Qaphela: Amalungu angamethiwe azokwabelwa umsebenzisi wamanje.
import-user-select: Khetha umsebenzisi wakho okhona ofuna ukumsebenzisa njengaleli lungu
label-delete-pop: Akukho ukuhlehlisa. Lokhu kuzosusa le lebula kuwo wonke amakhadi futhi kucekele phansi umlando wayo.
last-admin-desc: Awukwazi ukushintsha izindima ngoba kufanele okungenani kube nomlawuli oyedwa.
leave-board-pop: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukushiya __boardTitle__? Uzokhishwa kuwo wonke amakhadi kuleli bhodi.
list-archive-cards: Hambisa wonke amakhadi akulolu hlu kungobo yomlando
list-archive-cards-pop: Lokhu kuzosusa wonke amakhadi akulolu hlu ebhodini. Ukuze ubuke amakhadi Kungobo yomlando futhi uwabuyisele ebhodini, chofoza okuthi “Imenyu"> “Faka kungobo yomlando”.
list-delete-pop: Zonke izenzo zizosuswa kokuphakelayo komsebenzi futhi ngeke ukwazi ukubuyisela uhlu. Akukho ukuhlehlisa.
list-delete-suggest-archive: Ungahambisa uhlu Kungobo yomlando ukuze uyisuse ebhodini futhi ulondoloze umsebenzi.
muted-info: Awusoze waziswe nganoma yiziphi izinguquko kuleli bhodi
name: Igama
normal-desc: Angakwazi ukubuka futhi ahlele amakhadi. Ayikwazi ukushintsha izilungiselelo.
normal-assigned-only-desc: Amakhadi abelwe kuphela abonakalayo. Hlela njengomsebenzisi Ojwayelekile.
notify-participate: Thola izibuyekezo kunoma imaphi amakhadi owabamba iqhaza njengomdali noma ilungu
notify-watch: Thola izibuyekezo kunoma imaphi amabhodi, izinhlu, noma amakhadi owabukayo
page-maybe-private: Leli khasi lingase libe yimfihlo. Ungakwazi ukukubuka ngokuthi logging in.
paste-or-dragdrop: ukunamathisela, noma ukuhudula bese udedela ifayela lesithombe kuso (isithombe kuphela)
private-desc: Leli bhodi liyimfihlo. Abantu abengezwe ebhodini kuphela abangalibuka futhi balihlele.
public-desc: Leli bhodi lisesidlangalaleni. Ibonakala kunoma ubani onesixhumanisi futhi izovela ezinjinini zokusesha ezifana ne-Google. Abantu abengezwe ebhodini kuphela abangahlela.
quick-access-description: Faka inkanyezi ebhodini ukuze ungeze isinqamuleli kule bha.
remove-member-pop: Susa u-__name__ (__username__) kusuka ku-__boardTitle__? Ilungu lizokhishwa kuwo wonke amakhadi akuleli bhodi. Bazothola isaziso.
rescue-card-description: Bonisa ingxoxo yokuhlenga ngaphambi kokuvala izincazelo zamakhadi ezingalondoloziwe
rescue-card-description-dialogue: Bhala phezu kwencazelo yekhadi lamanje nezinguquko zakho?
search-cards: Sesha ezihlokweni zekhadi/zohlu, izincazelo nezinkambu zangokwezifiso kuleli bhodi
search-example: Bhala umbhalo owucingayo bese ucindezela u-Enter
set-wip-limit-value: Setha umkhawulo wenombolo enkulu yemisebenzi kulolu hlu
show-cards-minimum-count: Bonisa isibalo samakhadi uma uhlu luqukethe okungaphezu
star-board-title: Chofoza ukuze ufake inkanyezi leli bhodi. Izovela phezulu ohlwini lwakho lwamabhodi.
starred-boards-description: Amabhodi anenkanyezi avela phezulu ohlwini lwakho lwamabhodi.
title: Isihloko
toggle-assignees: Guqula abanikezwayo 1-9 ukuze uthole ikhadi (Nge-oda lokwengeza ebhodini).
toggle-labels: Guqula amalebula angu-1-9 ekhadini. Ukukhetha Okuningi kwengeza amalebula 1-9
tracking-info: Uzokwaziswa nganoma yiziphi izinguquko kulawo makhadi obandakanyekayo njengomdali noma ilungu.
custom-top-left-corner-logo-image-url: I-URL Yesithombe Selogo Yangokwezifiso Esekhoneni Lesinxele
custom-top-left-corner-logo-link-url: I-URL Yesixhumanisi Selogo Engaphezulu Kwesokunxele Ngokwezifiso
custom-top-left-corner-logo-height: Ngokwezifiso Ubude belogo yekhona kwesokunxele eliphezulu. Okuzenzakalelayo: 27
automatic-linked-url-schemes: Izikimu ze-URL yangokwezifiso okufanele zichofozeke ngokuzenzakalelayo. Isikimu se-URL esisodwa ngomugqa ngamunye
warn-list-archived: isixwayiso: leli khadi lisohlwini olufakwe kungobo yomlando
watching-info: Uzokwaziswa nganoma yiluphi ushintsho kuleli bhodi
wipLimitErrorPopup-dialog-pt1: Inani lemisebenzi kulolu hlu lingaphezulu komkhawulo we-WIP owuchazile.
wipLimitErrorPopup-dialog-pt2: Sicela ukhiphe eminye imisebenzi kulolu hlu, noma usethe umkhawulo we-WIP ophakeme.
attachment-transfer-limits-title: Attachment And API File Size Limits
attachment-transfer-limits-description: Configure maximum file size limits for uploads and downloads. API transfer buffering has separate server-side safety caps.
attachment-transfer-limits-save-failed: Failed to save attachment transfer limits
attachment-transfer-limits-invalid-value: Please enter a valid positive limit value
avatars-upload-blocked-description: Block users from uploading new avatars (useful when avatars are synced from another source). Avatars are enabled by default.
smtp-host-description: Ikheli leseva ye-SMTP ephethe ama-imeyili akho.
smtp-port-description: Imbobo esetshenziswa iseva yakho ye-SMTP kuma-imeyili aphumayo.
smtp-tls-description: Nika amandla usekelo lwe-TLS kuseva ye-SMTP
email-invite-register-text:
Sawubona __user__,

__inviter__ ukumema ebhodini le-kanban ukuze uthole ukusebenzisana.

Sicela ulandele isixhumanisi esingezansi:
__url__

Futhi ikhodi yakho yesimemo ithi: __icode__

Ngiyabonga.
tableVisibilityMode-allowPrivateOnly: Ukubonakala kwamabhodi: Vumela amabhodi ayimfihlo kuphela

delete-board-confirm-popup: Lonke uhlu, amakhadi, amalebula, nemisebenzi izosuswa futhi ngeke ukwazi ukubuyisela okuqukethwe kwebhodi. Akukho ukuhlehlisa.
delete-all-notifications-confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa zonke izaziso? Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa.
delete-duplicate-lists-confirm: Uqinisekile? Lokhu kuzosusa zonke izinhlu eziyimpinda ezinegama elifanayo futhi ezingenawo amakhadi.

r-workflow-help: Drag a trigger and an action into the builder, then add the rule. Drag an action onto an existing rule to change what it does.
r-import-trello: Import rules from Trello Butler (best effort)
r-import-paste: Paste exported rules (JSON or CSV) or Trello Butler commands here
r-import-trello-note: Trello board exports do not contain Butler rules. Paste Butler command text here to map the supported subset; unmapped lines are reported.
r-import-workflow-note: Import a visual workflow exported from n8n or Node-RED. Recognized trigger/action nodes are mapped to WeKan rules; unmapped nodes are reported.
r-when-card-in-list: When a card has been in list

r-checklist-note: Qaphela: izinto zohlu lokuhlola kufanele zibhalwe njengamavelu ahlukaniswe ngokhefana.
hide-card-counter-list: Fihla uhlu lwamakhadi kuwo Wonke Amabhodi
hide-board-member-list: Fihla uhlu lwamalungu ebhodi Kuwo Wonke Amabhodi

add-custom-html-before-body-end: Engeza i-HTML yangokwezifiso ngaphambi kokuthi </body> ekupheleni
oidc-button-text: Enza ngendlela oyifisayo umbhalo wenkinobho ye-OIDC
duplicate-board-confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuphinda leli bhodi?
swimlane-delete-pop: Zonke izenzo zizosuswa kokuphakelayo komsebenzi futhi ngeke ukwazi ukubuyisela umzila wokubhukuda. Akukho ukuhlehlisa.
act-a-dueAt:
ilungiswe isikhathi esifanele ukuze 
Nini: __timeValue__
Kuphi: __card__
 okwedlule okwakufuneka kwakungu-__timeOldValue__
act-a-endAt: silungise isikhathi sokugcina saba ngu-__timeValue__ kusuka ku-(__timeOldValue__)
act-a-startAt: kulungiswe isikhathi sokuqala saba ngu-__timeValue__ kusuka ku-(__timeOldValue__)
act-a-receivedAt: kulungiswe isikhathi esamukelwe ku-__timeValue__ kusuka ku-(__timeOldValue__)
act-almostdue: ibikhumbuza isikhathi samanje esifunekayo (__timeValue__) sokuthi __card__ siyeza
act-duenow: ibikhumbuza isikhathi samanje esifunekayo (__timeValue__) sika-__card__ manje
act-atUserComment: ukhulume ngawe ekhadini elithi __card__: __comment__ ohlwini __list__ ku-swimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__

delete-team-confirm-popup: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa leli qembu? Akukho ukuhlehlisa.
delete-org-confirm-popup: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa le nhlangano? Akukho ukuhlehlisa.
accounts-allowUserDelete: Vumela abasebenzisi ukuthi bazisuse ngokwabo i-akhawunti yabo
roles-info: Choose which board roles are allowed to perform each action. Admin Panel users (global admins) always have all rights and cannot be restricted here.
delete-linked-card-before-this-card: Awukwazi ukususa leli khadi ngaphambi kokuthi uqale ngokususa ikhadi elixhunyiwe elinalo
delete-linked-cards-before-this-list: Awukwazi ukususa lolu hlu ngaphambi kokuthi uqale ngokususa amakhadi axhunyiwe akhomba amakhadi akulolu hlu
drag-template-here-to-share: Drag a Template Board here to share it
remove-domain-from-board: Are you sure you want to remove this domain from this board ?
invalid-domain: Invalid domain. Use a domain like example.com (no @ or spaces).
shared-templates-info: Browse users' shareable template boards, grouped by Organization, Team or email Domain. Select one or more scopes below to show the matching shared templates. Only users whose Templates board is not empty are listed.
shared-templates-select-scope: Select a scope above (Organizations, Teams or Domains) to show shared templates.
dueCardsViewChange-choice-all-descriptio: Ibonisa wonke amakhadi angaphelele anedethi *Yomnqamulajuqu* evela emabhodini lapho umsebenzisi anemvume yawo.
globalSearchViewChange-choice-all-descri: Search all cards on boards for which you have permission. Choose *My cards* to limit results to cards where you are a member or assignee.
comment-not-found: Ikhadi elinamazwana aqukethe umbhalo othi '%s' alitholakali.
operator-limit-invalid: %s akuwona umkhawulo ovumelekile.  Umkhawulo kufanele ube inombolo ephelele.
globalSearch-instructions-description: Usesho lungabandakanya ama-opharetha ukuze acwenge ukusesha.  Ama-opharetha acaciswa ngokubhala igama lomsebenzisi nenani elihlukaniswe koloni.  Isibonelo, ukucaciswa komsebenzisi kokuthi `list:Blocked` kungakhawulela ukusesha kumakhadi aqukethwe ohlwini oluqanjwe ngokuthi *Ovinjiwe*.  Uma inani liqukethe izikhala noma izinhlamvu ezikhethekile kufanele lifakwe kuzimpawu zokucaphuna (isb. `__operator_list__:"To Review"`).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-due: `__operator_due__:<n>` - ​​amakhadi okumele akhokhe kufike ezinsukwini *<n>* kusukela manje.  `__operator_due__:__predicate_overdue__ ubala wonke amakhadi adlule usuku lwawo lomnqamulajuqu.
globalSearch-instructions-status-all: `__predicate_all__` - ​​wonke amakhadi afakwe kungobo yomlando nangafakwanga kungobo yomlando
globalSearch-instructions-operator-has: `__operator_has__:<field>` - ​​lapho *<field>* ingenye ye-`__predicate_attachment__`, `__predicate_checklist__`, `__predicate_description__`, `__predicate_start__`, `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_end__`, `__predicate_assignee__` noma `__predicate_member__`.  Ukubeka okuthi `-` ngaphambi kokuthi *<field>* kusesha ukungabikho kwevelu kuleyo nkambu (isb. `has:-due` usesha amakhadi ngaphandle kwedethi yamanqamu).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-sort: `__operator_sort__:<sort-name>` - ​​lapho *<sort-name>* ingenye ye-`__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_created__` noma `__predicate_modified__`.  Ukuze uthole uhlobo olwehlayo, beka `-` ngaphambi kwegama lokuhlunga.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-limit: `__operator_limit__:<n>` - ​​lapho *<n>* iyinani eliphelele elibonisa inombolo yamakhadi azoboniswa ekhasini ngalinye.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-2:
Ama-opharetha afanayo *NOMA* ahlanganiswe ndawonye.  Amakhadi afana nanoma yimiphi imibandela azobuyiswa.
U-`__operator_list__:Available __operator_list__:Blocked` uzobuyisela amakhadi aqukethwe kunoma yiluphi uhlu oluqanjwe ngokuthi *Ovinjiwe* noma *Okutholakalayo*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3: Ama-opharetha ahlukene *FUTHI* ahlanganiswe ndawonye.  Amakhadi afana nawo wonke ama-opharetha ahlukene abuyiselwayo.  U-`__operator_list__:Available __operator_label__:red` ubuyisela amakhadi kuphela ohlwini *Okutholakalayo* anelebula *elibomvu*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3-2: Izinsuku zingacaciswa njengenombolo ephozithivu noma enegethivu noma kusetshenziswa okuthi `__predicate_week__`, `__predicate_month__`, `__predicate_quarter__` noma `__predicate_year__` esikhathini samanje.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-5: Ngokuzenzakalelayo amakhadi afakwe kungobo yomlando awaseshwa.
drag-to-connect: Drag to connect to another card

server-error-troubleshooting:
Sicela uthumele iphutha elikhiqizwe iseva.
Ukuze ufake i-snap, sebenzisa: `sudo snap logs wekan.wekan`
Ukufaka i-Docker, sebenzisa: `sudo docker logs wekan-app`

now-activities-of-all-boards-are-hidden: Manje yonke imisebenzi yawo wonke amabhodi ifihliwe

newlineBecomesNewChecklistItem: Umugqa ngamunye wombhalo uba enye yezinto zohlu lokuhlola
newLineNewItem: Umugqa owodwa wombhalo = into eyodwa yohlu lokuhlola
newlineBecomesNewChecklistItemOriginOrde: Umugqa ngamunye wombhalo uba enye yezinto zohlu lokuhlola, ukuhleleka koqobo
move-all-attachments-of-board-to-fs: Hambisa konke okunamathiselwe ebhodini kusistimu yefayela
move-attachments-none-found: Nothing is stored on the selected source storage, so there is nothing to move.
attachment-repair-locations-description: Find attachments and avatars whose recorded storage (filesystem / GridFS / cloud) no longer matches where the file is, and fix the database to point at the real location.
default-save-storage-description: Choose the storage backend where newly uploaded attachments are saved.
mongodb-compact-description: After moving files out of MongoDB GridFS, the database file on disk does not shrink automatically. Running Compact reclaims freed space by rewriting the collection data. Only run this after bulk file moves are complete.
mongodb-compact-warning: Warning: Compact is a blocking operation that may take several minutes on large databases. On replica sets, all secondaries are compacted first (automatically), then the primary. On single-node replica sets used for oplog (common Meteor setup), only the primary is compacted.
mongodb-compact-running: Running compact, this may take several minutes...
invalid-file: Uma igama lefayela lingavumelekile, ukulayisha noma ukuqamba kabusha kukhanseliwe.
preview-pdf-not-supported: Idivayisi yakho ayikusekeli ukuhlola kuqala i-PDF. Zama ukulanda esikhundleni salokho.
drag-board-to-workspace: Hudula ibhodi ukuze unikeze u-__workspaces__ (yehlisa indawo yokusebenza kubha eseceleni)
translation-number: Inombolo yeyunithi yezinhlamvu zokuhumusha ngokwezifiso ithi:
delete-translation-confirm-popup: Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lolu chungechunge lokuhumusha ngokwezifiso? Akukho ukuhlehlisa.
import-board-zip: Engeza ifayela le-.zip elinamafayela ebhodi e-JSON, neziqondiso ezingaphansi zamagama ebhodi anezinamathiselwa
support-info-only-for-logged-in-users: Ulwazi losekelo olwabasebenzisi abangene ngemvume kuphela.
accounts-lockout-info: Lezi zilungiselelo zilawula ukuthi imizamo yokungena ivikelwa kanjani ekuhlaselweni ngenkani.
accounts-lockout-known-users: Izilungiselelo zabasebenzisi abaziwayo (igama lomsebenzisi elilungile, iphasiwedi engalungile)
accounts-lockout-locked-users-info: Abasebenzisi okwamanje bavalelwe ngaphandle ngenxa yemizamo eminingi ehlulekile yokungena ngemvume
accounts-lockout-confirm-unlock: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuvula lo msebenzisi?
accounts-lockout-confirm-unlock-all: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuvula bonke abasebenzisi abakhiyiwe?
admin-people-user-inactive: Umsebenzisi akasebenzi - chofoza ukuze wenze kusebenze
add-cron-job-placeholder: Engeza umsebenzi Ohleliwe Womsebenzi uyeza maduze
attachments-path-description: Indlela lapho amafayela okunamathiselwe agcinwa khona
avatars-path-description: Indlela lapho amafayela e-avatar agcinwa khona
cron-job-delete-confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lo msebenzi ohleliwe?
filesystem-enabled-description: Use local filesystem for file storage
s3-minio-storage-description: S3-compatible object storage: AWS S3, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Wasabi, DigitalOcean Spaces and others.
s3-force-path-style-description: Required by MinIO and most non-AWS S3-compatible servers.
azure-connection-string-description: Optional: use a full connection string instead of account name and key.
gcs-key-filename-description: Optional: path to a service account JSON key file on the server.
gcs-credentials-description: Optional: paste the service account JSON key. Leave blank to use the key file or default credentials.
gcs-permissions-note: Give WeKan's service account read/write access to the bucket: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → your bucket → Permissions → Grant access. In "New principals", paste the service account email — the "client_email" value from your JSON key — then choose the role "Storage Object Admin" and Save.
cloud-secret-keep-blank: Leave blank to keep the current value.
azure-account-name-description: The name of your Azure Storage account.
azure-container-description: The blob container to store files in.
gcs-bucket-description: The name of the Cloud Storage bucket to store files in.
s3-endpoint-menu-path: AWS: leave blank (uses the region endpoint). S3-compatible: the Endpoint URL from your MinIO / Cloudflare R2 / Backblaze B2 / Wasabi / DigitalOcean Spaces console.
s3-region-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → your bucket → Properties → AWS Region.
s3-bucket-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → your bucket name (or Create bucket → Bucket name).
s3-access-key-menu-path: AWS Console → IAM → Users → your user → Security credentials → Access keys → Create access key → choose use case 'Application running outside AWS' → Create access key. Shown as 'Access key ID'.
s3-secret-key-menu-path: Same screen as the Access key ID; 'Secret access key' is shown only once when the key is created — copy it then (or Download .csv).
azure-account-name-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → name shown at the top (also under Security + networking → Access keys → Storage account name).
azure-account-key-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Show → Key.
azure-connection-string-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Connection string → Show.
azure-container-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Data storage → Containers → your container (or + Container to create one).
gcs-project-id-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → project selector at the top → your project's ID (Cloud overview → Dashboard → Project info → Project ID).
gcs-bucket-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → your bucket name (or Create to make one).
gcs-key-filename-menu-path: Path on the WeKan server to the downloaded service account JSON key file (created below). Use this OR paste the JSON into the field below.
gcs-credentials-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service accounts → your service account → Keys → Add key → Create new key → JSON → Create (downloads the file). Paste its contents here, or save the file and set its path above.
attachment-move-storage-azure: Move attachment to Azure Blob Storage
attachment-move-storage-gcs: Move attachment to Google Cloud Storage
gridfs-enabled-description: Sebenzisa i-MongoDB GridFS ukuze ugcine ifayela
migration-stop-confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukumisa konke ukufuduka?
gridfs-move-collectionfs-note: To have attachments and avatars visible, move them from CollectionFS to any other Storage.
s3-enabled-description: Sebenzisa i-AWS S3 noma i-MiniO ukuze ugcine ifayela
s3-endpoint-description: I-URL yephoyinti lokugcina le-S3 (isb., s3.amazonaws.com noma i-minio.example.com)
writable-path-description: Indlela eyisisekelo yohlu lwemibhalo yokugcina ifayela
comprehensive-board-migration-descriptio: Yenza ukuhlola okuphelele nokulungiswa kobuqotho bedatha yebhodi, okuhlanganisa ukuhleleka kohlu, ukuma kwamakhadi, nesakhiwo sokubhukuda.
delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migration-d: Isusa ngokuphephile izinhlu eziyimpinda ezingenalutho. Isusa kuphela izinhlu ezingenawo amakhadi FUTHI ibe nolunye uhlu olunesihloko esifanayo esiqukethe amakhadi.
restore-lost-cards-migration-description: Ithola futhi ibuyisele amakhadi nezinhlu ezine-swimlaneId engekho noma i-listId. Idala indlela yokubhukuda 'Yamakhadi Alahlekile' ukuze wenze zonke izinto ezilahlekile zibonakale futhi.
restore-all-archived-migration-descripti: Ibuyisela zonke izindawo zokubhukuda ezifakwe kungobo yomlando, izinhlu, namakhadi. Ilungisa ngokuzenzakalelayo noma iyiphi i-swimlaneId engekho noma i-listId ukuze wenze izinto zibonakale.
fix-missing-lists-migration-description: Ithola futhi ilungise uhlu olulahlekile noma olonakele esakhiweni sebhodi.
fix-avatar-urls-migration-description: Ibuyekeza ama-URL e-avatar ukuze amalungu ebhodi asebenzise i-backend yesitoreji efanele futhi alungise izithenjwa eziphukile ze-avatar.
fix-all-file-urls-migration-description: Ibuyekeza wonke ama-URL ananyathiselwe ifayela kuleli bhodi ukuze asebenzise isipele esilungile sesitoreji futhi alungise izithenjwa zefayela eziphukile.
migrations-admin-only: Abaphathi bebhodi kuphela abangasebenzisa ukuthuthela kwelinye izwe
migrations-description: Yenza ukuhlolwa kobuqotho bedatha nokulungiswa kwaleli bhodi. Ukuthutha ngakunye kungenziwa ngakunye.
run-comprehensive-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzokwenza ukuthutha okuphelele ukuze kuhlolwe futhi kulungiswe ubuqotho bedatha yebhodi. Lokhu kungase kuthathe isikhashana. Qhubeka?
run-delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migrati: Lokhu kuzoqale kuguqule noma iluphi uhlu olwabiwe lube uhlu lokubhukuda ngakunye, bese kusula uhlu olungenalutho olunohlu oluyimpinda olunesihloko esifanayo esiqukethe amakhadi. Uhlu olungenalutho olungadingeki ngempela kuphela oluzosuswa. Qhubeka?
run-restore-lost-cards-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzodala indlela yokubhukuda ethi 'Amakhadi Alahlekile' futhi kubuyisele wonke amakhadi nezinhlu ezine-swimlaneId engekho noma i-listId. Lokhu kuthinta kuphela izinto ezingagciniwe. Qhubeka?
run-restore-all-archived-migration-confi: Lokhu kuzobuyisela ZONKE izindawo zokubhukuda ezifakwe kungobo yomlando, izinhlu, namakhadi, kuzenze zibonakale futhi. Noma yiziphi izinto ezinomazisi abangekho zizolungiswa ngokuzenzakalelayo. Lokhu akukwazi ukuhlehliswa kalula. Qhubeka?
run-fix-missing-lists-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzothola futhi kulungise izinhlu ezingekho noma ezonakele esakhiweni sebhodi. Qhubeka?
run-fix-avatar-urls-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzobuyekeza ama-URL e-avatar ukuze amalungu ebhodi asebenzise i-backend yesitoreji efanele. Qhubeka?
run-fix-all-file-urls-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzobuyekeza wonke ama-URL okunamathiselwe kwifayela kuleli bhodi ukuze kusetshenziswe isipele esilungile sesitoreji. Qhubeka?
restore-lost-cards-nothing-to-restore: Awekho ama-swimlanes alahlekile, izinhlu, noma amakhadi azobuyiselwa
migration-progress-note: Sicela ulinde ngenkathi sithuthela ibhodi lakho esakhiweni sakamuva...
conversion-info-text: Lokhu kuguqulwa kwenziwa kanye ebhodini ngalinye futhi kuthuthukisa ukusebenza. Ungaqhubeka nokusebenzisa ibhodi ngokujwayelekile.
converting-board-description: Ukuguqula isakhiwo sebhodi ukuze kusebenze okuthuthukisiwe. Lokhu kungase kuthathe isikhashana.
database-migration-description: Ukubuyekeza ukwakheka kwesizindalwazi ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukusebenza nokusebenza. Le nqubo ingase ithathe amaminithi ambalwa.
migration-batch-size-description: Inani lezinanyathiselwa okufanele zicutshungulwe eqeqebeni ngalinye (1-100)
migration-cpu-threshold-description: Misa isikhashana ukuthutha lapho ukusetshenziswa kwe-CPU kudlula leli phesenti (10-90)
migration-info-text: Ukuthutha kwesizindalwazi kwenziwa kanye futhi kuthuthukise ukusebenza kwesistimu. Inqubo iyaqhubeka ngemuva ngisho noma uvala isiphequluli sakho.
migration-resume-failed: Yehlulekile ukuqalisa kabusha ukuthuthela kwelinye izwe
migration-warning-text: Sicela ungasivali isiphequluli sakho ngesikhathi sokuthutha. Inqubo izoqhubeka ngemuva kodwa ingase ithathe isikhathi eside ukuqeda.
account-locked: I-akhawunti ikhiyiwe okwesikhashana ngenxa yemizamo eminingi ehlulekile yokungena ngemvume. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
username-too-short: Igama lomsebenzisi kufanele okungenani libe nezinhlamvu ezi-3
